title: Salty Gooey Argentinian Radish Salad
description: A zesty, slightly tangy radish salad with melted cheese and a low-FODMAP, soy‑based dressing, perfect for a quick, energizing lunch.

ingredients.name: Low‑FODMAP tamari (gluten‑free soy sauce)
ingredients.notes: use a low‑salt version if preferred

instructions: Wash and thin‑slice the radishes into 1‑mm rounds using a mandoline or sharp knife.
In a small bowl whisk together the tamari, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper to create a bright, salty dressing.
Place the sliced radishes in a large bowl, pour the dressing over them, and toss until evenly coated.
Add the shredded lactose‑free mozzarella to the radishes, gently fold to combine; the residual heat will create a lightly gooey layer.
Sprinkle the roasted pumpkin seeds over the salad for added texture.
Toss lightly again, adjust seasoning if needed, and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately at room temperature for the best texture and flavor.
